description: Due to a service outage, a client is being given a one-time credit on their next invoice, as per their SLA.

nodes.task_description: Confirm the SLA credit amount that is due to the client.

expected_outcome.value: The account manager calculates the correct credit amount.

nodes.task_description: Create a credit memo in the PSA/billing tool for that amount.

expected_outcome.value: A credit memo is created in the system.

nodes.task_description: Apply the credit memo to the client's account so it will be automatically deducted from their next invoice.

expected_outcome.value: The credit is successfully applied to the client's account.
